rows.description: Volta Varia - Brought over
rows.notes: Pounds and shillings from consensus. Pence whole '11' from gpt-5-mini's careful reading of cramped digit. Fraction '0.5' clearly visible in image, as noted by gemini-flash, but missed by gpt-5-mini. Combined to form 11.5 pence. 'Varia' from gpt-5-mini is clearer than 'Trans' from gemini-flash. Initial 'Volta' is a plausible reading, clearer than 'Polinte'.

rows.description: To Mr Luports Provisional Stipend to X Day
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which is significantly more accurate for the name and day compared to gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Provisional stipend paid to Mr Luport, covering up to Christmas Day.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Provisional stipend paid to Mr Luport, covering up to Christmas Day, amounting to £12 10s 0d.

rows.description: Gile & Ward – Painting for Garnton Chancel
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description from gemini-flash; 'Garnton' is visibly correct over gpt-5-mini's 'Yarnton'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Gile & Ward for painting the chancel at Garnton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Gile & Ward for painting the chancel at Garnton, amounting to £3 5s 0d.

rows.description: To Subrector for Gate & Chimney Piece
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description combined: 'To Subrector' from gemini-flash is correct; '&' between 'Gate' and 'Chimney Piece' from gpt-5-mini is correct, missed by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini's name reading 'Wm. Shreector' is incorrect.
rows.english_description: Payment to the sub-rector for provision of a gate and a chimney-piece.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the sub-rector for provision of a gate and a chimney-piece, amounting to £17 0s 0d.

rows.description: Paid for repairs in Garnton Chancel
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which is accurately 'Paid for repairs in Garnton Chancel'. gpt-5-mini's 'Fathers' and 'Yarnton' are incorrect.
rows.english_description: Payment for repair work in the Garnton chancel.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for repair work in the Garnton chancel, amounting to £2 8s 6d.

rows.description: Mr Hastings balance on Works at Campfield and half cost of measuring
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which correctly combined the two physical lines of the braced description into a single logical entry with its amount. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into two rows, with the first having no amount.
rows.english_description: Balance due to Mr Hastings for works at Campfield including half the cost of measuring.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance due to Mr Hastings for works at Campfield including half the cost of measuring, amounting to £132 15s 0d.

rows.english_description: Contribution to the Bishop of Guiana for the diocesan college.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Contribution to the Bishop of Guiana for the diocesan college, amounting to £25 0s 0d.

rows.english_description: Contribution to the Abingdon church extension fund.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Contribution to the Abingdon church extension fund, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.description: Bills for a door at South Newington
rows.notes: Full consensus between both extractors for description and amounts, including the '½' pence fraction.
rows.english_description: Payment of bills for a new door at South Newington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of bills for a new door at South Newington, amounting to £1 4s 4½d.

rows.description: Receipt Stamps
rows.notes: Description and shillings/pence from consensus. Pounds amount '1' from gemini-flash, correctly interpreting the ditto mark ('"') under the previous entry's pounds column. gpt-5-mini misinterpreted this as '0' pounds.
rows.english_description: Purchase of receipt stamps.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of receipt stamps, amounting to £1 10s 0d.

rows.description: Shrubbs – half of bill for zinc covering
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description corrected: 'Shrubbs' is visibly accurate over 'Shrubber' (gemini-flash) or 'Shrubb.' (gpt-5-mini). 'bill' is correct, as in gemini-flash, over 'tile' from gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Payment of half the bill to Shrubbs for zinc covering.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of half the bill to Shrubbs for zinc covering, amounting to £7 8s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Austin for draining around the chancel at Kidlington, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.description: Loan to a Rector – half of 3d Instalment

rows.description: Bills at Merton for Thatching

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of bills at Merton for thatching work, amounting to £6 10s 0½d.

rows.description: Two Do. et Do. – for Gates
rows.notes: Pounds and pence from consensus. Shillings '4' and 'et' in description from gemini-flash, both visually confirmed over gpt-5-mini's '7' shillings and 'at'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Two similar bills for gates at Merton, amounting to £12 4s 2d.

rows.english_description: Purchase of timber for poles.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of timber for poles, amounting to £12 16s 0d.

rows.description: Mr Luports Provisional Stipend to Miss L.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Provisional stipend for Miss L., administered via Mr Luport, amounting to £12 10s 0d.
